query: Red Lobster bankruptcy exit date Chapter 11 restructuring debt reduction RL Investor Holdings September 2024 court approved plan

{"query":"Red Lobster bankruptcy exit date Chapter 11 restructuring debt reduction RL Investor Holdings September 2024 court approved plan","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2198,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"PR Newswire – Orlando, Fla, September 16, 2024 – The Red Lobster® restaurant chain today announces its exit from Chapter 11 restructuring and the completion of its acquisition by RL Investor Holdings LLC.Sep 16, 2024"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.fortress.com/news/2024-09-16-red-lobster-exits-bankruptcy-damola-adamolekun-appointed-ceo#:~:text=PR%20Newswire%20%E2%80%93%20Orlando%2C%20Fla%2C,by%20RL%20Investor%20Holdings%20LLC.","title":"Red Lobster Exits Bankruptcy; Damola Adamolekun appointed CEO | Fortress","content":"Acquisition by RL Investor Holdings LLC Completed -- Red Lobster is one of world’s largest seafood restaurant chains -- 545 restaurants in 44 US States and four Canadian provinces
PR Newswire – Orlando, Fla, September 16, 2024 – The Red Lobster® restaurant chain today announces its exit from Chapter 11 restructuring and the completion of its acquisition by RL Investor Holdings LLC.
“Red Lobster is now a stronger, more resilient company, and today is the start of a new chapter in our history,” said Damola Adamolekun, CEO of Red Lobster.
As a result of the acquisition, Red Lobster has exited its Chapter 11 bankruptcy restructuring.
From today, Red Lobster is an independent, privately held company with 545 restaurant locations across 44 U.S. states and four Canadian Provinces.
With a proud heritage, Red Lobster is focused on serving the highest quality, freshly prepared seafood that is traceable, sustainable, and responsibly sourced."},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/red-lobster-receives-court-approval-of-chapter-11-plan-nears-exit-of-bankruptcy-302239845.html","title":"Red Lobster Receives Court Approval of Chapter 11 Plan; Nears Exit of Bankruptcy","content":"Under Chapter 11 plan, Red Lobster will be acquired by RL Investor Holdings LLC, an entity backed by Fortress Investment Group
On completion of the acquisition, Damola Adamolekun will become the CEO of the Red Lobster restaurant chain, and Jonathan Tibus, who has served as the Company's CEO during the reorganization, will step down from the role and leave the Company.
Jonathan Tibus added, "I'm proud of what Red Lobster has achieved during this restructuring – the Company will emerge from Chapter 11 stronger financially and operationally, and with new backers who are resolutely focused on investment and growth.
Red Lobster is the world's largest and most-loved seafood restaurant company, headquartered in Orlando, Fla."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/09/05/red-lobster-bankruptcy-court-approves-plan-to-exit-chapter-11.html","title":"Red Lobster bankruptcy: Court approves plan to exit Chapter 11","content":"Red Lobster is one step closer to exiting Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection after a court approved its restructuring plan.
After slimming down its restaurant portfolio, the chain currently operates 544 restaurants across the U.S. and Canada."},{"url":"https://www.restaurantdive.com/news/red-lobster-court-approval-restructuring-buyout-lan/726219/","title":"Court approves Red Lobster’s restructuring, buyout plan | Restaurant Dive","content":"Sep 6, 2024 — Red Lobster filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protections in May 2024, and the court approved its restructuring plan on Sept. 5, 2024.
Red Lobster received court approval of its restructuring plan and sale to Fortress Investment Group, via RL Investor Holdings, on Thursday, the company said in a press release.
The company previously filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protections in May.
RL Investor Holdings was an entity created by Fortress alongside co-investors TCW Private Credit and Blue Torch."},{"url":"https://www.frozenfoodsbiz.com/red-lobster-gets-chapter-11-plan-approval-and-nears-bankruptcy-exit/","title":"Red Lobster Gets Chapter 11 Plan Approval and Nears Bankruptcy Exit | Frozen Foods Biz","content":"By John 8th September 2024
Red Lobster Management LLC, along with its Red Lobster restaurant chain subsidiary, has received court approval for its Chapter 11 bankruptcy reorganization plan.
I cannot wait to get started on our plan with the company’s more than 30,000 team members across the USA and Canada.”"}]}
